'''''The Empire Strikes Back Weekly'' 122''' is the one hundred twenty-second issue of the ''[[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly]]'' series of comic reprints, published on [[June 25]], [[1980]].

==Contents==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 40|''Star Wars'' (1977) 40]] {{C|Part 2}}
*"Heroes of the galaxy: Man-Wolf Part 9: A terrible shock awaits!"
*"Monsters of the cosmos Part 4: Life on Mars!"
*"Tales of the Watcher: One of our spacemen is missing!"
